name: Whole Foods Market
description: Exports your Whole Foods Market order history (via Amazon) and product nutrition data using Playwright browser automation.

scopes.label: Account profile
scopes.description: Your Amazon account name and email associated with Whole Foods orders

scopes.label: Order history
scopes.description: Whole Foods delivery and pickup orders with item names, quantities, prices, and order dates

scopes.label: Product nutrition
scopes.description: Nutrition facts (calories, macros, sodium, fiber, vitamins) for each product ordered. Aligned to Schema.org NutritionInformation.
